retrospective.harder_than_needed: S3 was implemented by the lead directly (not via base:integration-architect) because that subagent type became unavailable after a VM crash mid-epic. The lead had full context from the architecture/exploration work, so the page-branch + preview component + new e2e spec landed cleanly, but independent architect authorship was replaced by lead authorship + Codex as the independent reviewer at the pre-commit gate.
retrospective.surprised_by: The app's create-group flow takes a name only (no description), so the preview's description branch is not e2e-observable with app-created groups; covered by unit conditional render + spec amendment instead.
